# Ikamba Adventure

> Ikamba Adventure is a Tanzania-based tour and travel company specializing in wildlife safaris, Mount Kilimanjaro climbing expeditions, and authentic cultural adventures.

## About

Ikamba Adventure is a licensed Tanzanian tour operator with offices in Dar es Salaam and Arusha. We offer expertly guided wildlife safaris across Tanzania's national parks and game reserves, as well as guided Kilimanjaro climbs on all major routes.

## Services

- **Northern Circuit Safaris** — Serengeti National Park, Ngorongoro Crater, Tarangire, Lake Manyara, Arusha National Park
- **Southern Circuit Safaris** — Ruaha, Selous/Nyerere, Mikumi, Katavi, Mahale, Saadani, Udzungwa
- **Kilimanjaro Climbing** — Machame, Marangu, Lemosho, Rongai, Umbwe, Shira routes
- **Cultural Tours** — local community visits and authentic Tanzanian cultural experiences
- **Car Hire & Transfers** — airport transfers and private vehicle hire across Tanzania
